patterns.name: overflow-hidden-clips-children
patterns.rule: overflow:hidden on a parent silently clips children that extend beyond bounds. Check all child elements before adding it.

patterns.name: script-order-dependency

patterns.name: unhandled-exception
patterns.rule: Wrap external calls (DOM, fetch, JSON.parse, localStorage) in try-catch. Unhandled exceptions crash the entire function.
patterns.rootCause: Wrapped code in try-catch — was crashing on error. Also: Added storage access safety — was crashing on parse error or missing key; Wrapped code in try-catch — was crashing on error

patterns.name: missing-return-statement
patterns.rule: Functions that compute values must return them. Missing return causes undefined results and silent failures.

patterns.rule: Use path constants or import for assets. Hardcoded paths break when files move or builds change output directories.

patterns.name: use-before-define
patterns.rule: Use typeof check before accessing globals that may not be loaded yet. This often indicates a load-order dependency.
patterns.rootCause: Added typeof !== undefined guard — variable was used before definition. Also: Added missing return statement — function was returning undefined; Added || [] fallback — was calling array method on undefined

patterns.name: object-fit-crops-content
patterns.rule: object-fit:cover crops images to fill container. Use contain if the full image must be visible (e.g., card art, logos).
patterns.rootCause: Changed object-fit: cover → contain — image was being cropped. Also: Changed width: calc(100% - 16px) → calc(100% - 12px); Changed height: 180px → 200px

patterns.name: missing-await
patterns.rule: Every async function call that returns data you use must be awaited. Missing await causes race conditions where code uses stale/undefined values.
patterns.rootCause: Added missing await — was ignoring promise result. Also: Added missing return statement — function was returning undefined; Added 2 optional chaining operator(s) — null reference fix

patterns.name: innerhtml-destroys-handlers
patterns.rule: innerHTML = ... destroys all event handlers on child elements. Use textContent for text-only updates, or insertAdjacentHTML/replaceWith to preserve siblings.
patterns.rootCause:
Replaced innerHTML with textContent — XSS or handler-destruction fix. Also: Added missing return statement — function was returning undefined; Changed font-size: 14px">◆0' + '
●

patterns.name: defer-before-dependency
patterns.rule: Never use defer on scripts that other scripts depend on at load time. If script B calls script A's globals, A must load synchronously before B.
patterns.rootCause: Removed defer attribute from script tag. Also: Removed overflow:hidden to fix clipping

patterns.name: missing-touch-support
patterns.rule: Desktop-only event handlers (click, hover) don't work on mobile. Always test touch interactions and add touch/pointer event handlers.
patterns.rootCause: Added touch event handling — broken on mobile. Also: Modified conditional logic; Added touch event handling — broken on mobile

patterns.name: race-condition-needs-delay
patterns.rule: If you need setTimeout to fix a bug, you have a race condition. Find the root cause (missing callback, wrong event, load order) instead of papering over it with delays.
patterns.rootCause: Added setTimeout(500ms) — timing/race condition fix. Also: Added setTimeout(300ms) — timing/race condition fix; Added string fallback — was showing undefined/null in UI

insights.rootCause: Added scroll handling — content was not scrollable or jumping. Also: Changed z-index: 0 → -1; Added touch event handling — broken on mobile
insights.prevention: Long content needs scroll containers. Check overflow behavior when content grows beyond initial viewport.

insights.rootCause: Changed display:none to visible — element was incorrectly hidden. Also: Changed height: 120px → 100%; Changed background: linear-gradient(180deg,#ffcc70 0%,#ff9500 30%,#ff6b00 60%,#cc4400 100%) → radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 20%,rgba(255,107,0,.2) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 80%
insights.prevention: display:none removes elements from layout entirely. Use visibility:hidden or opacity:0 if the element's space should be preserved.

insights.rootCause: Added display:none — element was incorrectly visible. Also: Changed resource path; Added string fallback — was showing undefined/null in UI
insights.prevention: Elements visible when they shouldn't be — check initial state and conditional rendering logic.
Changed conditional logic — verify all branches are correct and edge cases are handled.

insights.rootCause: Switched from string concat to template literal — concatenation bug
insights.prevention: Use template literals instead of string concatenation. Concatenation bugs (missing spaces, wrong order) are harder to spot.
